narrative:
Strongsville-02-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 969 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.3 percentage points.
